coach_notes: For the Houseperson role, 'foodsafety' and 'foodpreparation' are critical gaps since this job likely involves handling or cleaning food-related areas. For the Associate Website Designer position, missing 'graphicdesign', 'adobecreativesuite', 'photoshop', 'illustrator', 'typography', 'layout', and 'figma' are significant as these are core design tools and skills. For the Sales/Stock Stylist role, 'cashhandling' is a key gap for processing transactions, while 'foodsafety' may be less relevant unless the store sells food items.

jobs.title: Houseperson
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your skills in receiving, inspecting, materials, and teamwork directly match houseperson duties like stocking supplies and maintaining cleanliness. Your store opening and team lead experience show you can handle physical tasks and coordinate with others.
jobs.gaps: No specific gaps; ensure you highlight any prior hotel or hospitality experience if available.

jobs.title: (Part Time) Las Vegas South Premium Outlet Sales/Stock Stylist
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your picking and packing, accurate pricing, receiving, and team player skills are directly relevant to sales/stock styling. Store opening and teamwork experience align with retail operations.
jobs.gaps: No significant gaps; consider highlighting any fashion or visual merchandising interest.

jobs.title: Associate Website Designer
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your creative and social media skills show some design sense, and problem-solving helps with technical challenges.
jobs.gaps: Major gaps: no web design, coding, or UX/UI experience. Need portfolio and technical skills like HTML/CSS, design tools (e.g., Figma, Adobe XD).

jobs.title: Bartender - Brothers Bar & Grill,  Broad Ripple, Indianapolis, IN
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Your communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills are useful in a fast-paced bar environment.
jobs.gaps: Major gaps: no bartending experience, knowledge of drink recipes, or cash handling skills. Need training or certification.

jobs.title: Installation Apprentice
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Your materials, project, and problem-solving skills apply to installation tasks. Teamwork and receiving/inspecting help with on-site coordination.
jobs.gaps: Gaps: no specific installation or construction experience, lack of technical trade skills (e.g., window fitting, tools). Apprenticeship may provide training.
